ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visiting team */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "record" TEXT /* Record of the game in terms of wins/losses/ties */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned from the game */,
  "game_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into a shootout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES referees ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Primary arena where the team plays */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defenseman) */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game in which stats were recorded */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose stats are recorded */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the game */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties received by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Player's plus-minus rating */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "faceoffs_won" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs won */,
  "faceoffs_lost" INTEGER /* Number of faceoffs lost */,
  "blocked_shots" INTEGER /* Number of blocked shots */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach is associated with */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the coach is coaching in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "opened_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was opened */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL or path to the venue's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referees" (
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referee */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of officiating experience */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the referee */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the referee */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the referee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the referee */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the referee is officiating in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referees_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
